criteria_results.criterion: Top app bar Fortuna + avatar + notifications

T-017.architectural_note: Form is inline in screen files (TransactionFormSheet in dashboard, _TransactionFormContent in history) rather than a separate file. Functionally equivalent.

criteria_results.criterion: Transaction model includes category field with default 'Other'
fromJson/toJson backward compatible with existing data
StatelessWidget with transaction and onDelete parameters
Category icon in colored circle (green for income, blue for expenses)
Colored amount (red for expense, green for income)
Card with shadow and rounded corners

issues.message: build method in _TransactionFormContentState is long (consider extracting form fields)
issues.fix_hint: Consider extracting the form content into a separate widget method

criteria_results.criterion: StatefulWidget with search controller and active filter state
Search bar with real-time filtering by description and category
Filter chips: Filters, This Month, Income, Expense
Transactions grouped by date (Today, Yesterday, date headers)
Fortuna header with avatar and notification bell
Empty state with icon and helpful message
Modal bottom sheet with category dropdown for expenses

files.content: Existing test file covers Transaction model with category field
Updated widget tests cover TransactionListItem within screen context
covers_criteria: Transaction list item renders with description

files.content: Updated widget tests cover new screen design

overview.problem: The transaction history screen is not connected to the app's bottom navigation — users cannot navigate to it from the main dashboard.
overview.solution: Restructure the app router to use ShellRoute with bottom navigation, connecting the transaction history screen as a proper tab alongside the dashboard.
overview.target_user: Fortuna budget app users who need to review and manage their transaction history.
overview.success_metric: Users can tap the History tab in the bottom nav to switch to the transaction history screen, and the Add tab opens the transaction form.

screens.name: Transaction History
screens.purpose: Browse, search, filter, and delete transactions grouped by date.

features.name: Transaction Search
features.description: Real-time search across transaction descriptions and categories as the user types.
acceptance_criteria: Given the user types in the search bar, when text is entered, then the transaction list filters in real-time matching description or category.
Given no search text is entered, when the screen loads, then all transactions are shown.
Given search text matches no transactions, when filtered, then the empty state is shown.

features.name: Transaction Filters
features.description: Filter chips for quick filtering by This Month, Income, and Expense.
acceptance_criteria: Given the user taps 'This Month', when active, then only transactions from the current month are shown.
Given the user taps 'Income', when active, then only positive-amount transactions are shown.
Given the user taps 'Expense', when active, then only negative-amount transactions are shown.
Given a filter is active, when the user taps it again, then the filter is cleared and all transactions are shown.

features.name: Date Grouping
features.description: Transactions grouped under date headers: Today, Yesterday, and full date labels.
acceptance_criteria: Given transactions exist for today, when the screen loads, then they appear under a 'Today' header with date subtitle.
Given transactions exist for yesterday, when the screen loads, then they appear under a 'Yesterday' header.
Given transactions exist for older dates, when the screen loads, then they appear under 'Mon DD, YYYY' headers.

features.name: Category Support
features.description: Transactions have categories with icons and auto-categorization.
acceptance_criteria: Given a transaction has a category, when displayed, then the category icon appears in a colored circle.
Given a transaction is income, when displayed, then the icon circle is green and amount is green.
Given a transaction is an expense, when displayed, then the icon circle is blue and amount is red.
Given the user adds a transaction, when the form is shown, then a category dropdown is available for expenses.

features.name: Fortuna Header
features.description: Sticky header with Fortuna branding, user avatar, and notification bell.
acceptance_criteria: Given the screen loads, when viewed, then the header shows 'Fortuna' title and avatar.
Given the user scrolls, when scrolling, then the header remains visible.

features.name: Bottom Tab Navigation
features.description: ShellRoute-based bottom navigation with Home, History, Add, and Budgets tabs using go_router.
acceptance_criteria: Given the app loads, when viewed, then a bottom navigation bar is visible with 4 tabs.
Given the user taps 'History', when active, then the transaction history screen is displayed.
Given the user taps 'Home', when active, then the dashboard screen is displayed.
Given the user taps 'Add', when active, then the add transaction bottom sheet opens.
Given a tab is active, when viewed, then it shows a pill-shaped highlight.

state_management.justification: Existing project uses Provider. Small project (2 screens), no complex shared state. PRD signals: local-only data, simple CRUD.

navigation.justification: PRD FEA-006: 4-tab bottom navigation. go_router ShellRoute provides nested navigation with persistent bottom bar.

local_storage.justification: Simple key-value storage for transactions. PRD: local-only, no backend.

di.justification: Provider IS the DI system for this project. No additional DI package needed.

observability.justification: Small project, local-only. No remote error tracking needed.

tickets.title: Add category field to Transaction model and BudgetModel
tickets.description: Add category field to Transaction model with backward-compatible JSON serialization. Update addTransaction to accept optional category parameter.
inputs: Existing Transaction model has amount, description, date fields
Existing addTransaction takes amount and description
acceptance_criteria: Transaction model has a category field with default value 'Other'
fromJson handles missing category key gracefully (defaults to 'Other')
toJson includes category field
addTransaction accepts optional category parameter
Existing JSON data without category field loads without errors
tickets.coder_notes: Use `json['category'] as String? ?? 'Other'` for backward compatibility. The category field should be optional with a default.

tickets.title: Redesign TransactionListItem widget to match Fortuna reference
tickets.description: Redesign transaction list item with category icon in colored circle, merchant name, time+category subtitle, colored amount, and label tag.
inputs: Fortuna reference design: category icon in 48x48 colored circle, semibold merchant name, time + category subtitle, red/green amount, small label tag
acceptance_criteria: Category icon displayed in 48x48 colored circle (green for income, blue for expenses)
Merchant name shown in semibold 16px
Time (12-hour format) and category label shown as subtitle
Amount colored red for expenses, green for income
Small uppercase label tag below amount
Delete button with delete_outline icon
Card has shadow and 12px rounded corners
InkWell tap target for the whole card
tickets.coder_notes: Use FortunaColors for all colors. Map category to icon using a getter. Format time as 'H:MM AM/PM'.

tickets.title: Redesign TransactionHistoryScreen with search, filters, and date grouping
tickets.description: Redesign transaction history screen with Fortuna header, search bar, filter chips, date grouping, and updated add transaction form with category dropdown.
inputs: Fortuna reference design: sticky header, search with icon, horizontal filter chips, date headers (Today/Yesterday/date), empty state
acceptance_criteria: Fortuna header with avatar, title, and notification bell
Search bar with search icon and real-time filtering by description and category
Filter chips: Filters (reset), This Month, Income, Expense — pill-shaped, toggleable
Transactions grouped under 'Today', 'Yesterday', and 'Mon DD, YYYY' headers
Date headers show date subtitle for Today/Yesterday
Empty state with receipt_long icon and helpful message
FAB for adding transactions
Add transaction form includes category dropdown for expenses
Income/Expense toggle with ChoiceChips
Filter chip state managed via setState
tickets.coder_notes: Use GestureDetector for filter chips (not FilterChip) for custom styling. Group transactions using DateTime comparison (today/yesterday/other). Use TextEditingController for search with onChanged callback.

tickets.title: Restructure app router with ShellRoute for tab navigation
tickets.description: Replace flat GoRouter routes with ShellRoute containing _ShellScaffold with bottom navigation bar. 4 tabs: Home, History, Add, Budgets.
acceptance_criteria: ShellRoute wraps all tab routes
_ShellScaffold provides bottom navigation with 4 tabs
Tab switching uses context.go()
Add tab triggers bottom sheet and redirects to dashboard
Active tab shows pill-shaped highlight
tickets.coder_notes: Use GoRouterState.of(context).uri to determine active tab. Import BudgetModel in router for the add form.

tickets.title: Remove duplicate bottom nav and FAB from dashboard screen
tickets.description: Remove _buildBottomNav method, _NavItem class, and bottomNavigationBar from DashboardScreen since the shell handles navigation.
acceptance_criteria: No bottomNavigationBar in DashboardScreen
No _buildBottomNav method
No _NavItem class
FAB still present for desktop layout
tickets.coder_notes: Keep the FAB for desktop (isDesktop check). Only remove mobile bottom nav.

tickets.title: Remove FAB and add transaction sheet from transaction history screen
tickets.description: Remove FloatingActionButton and _showAddTransactionSheet from TransactionHistoryScreen since the shell's Add tab handles it.
inputs: T-022: ShellRoute Add tab handles transaction creation
acceptance_criteria: No FloatingActionButton in TransactionHistoryScreen
No _showAddTransactionSheet method
Search, filters, and transaction list still work
tickets.coder_notes: Remove FAB and _showAddTransactionSheet. Keep _TransactionFormContent for potential inline use.
